title: Anthropic Messages API tool definition
description: Schema for a single entry in the `tools: []` array passed to POST /v1/messages. See https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/agents-and-tools/tool-use/define-tools.md for the canonical reference.

name.description: Tool name. Letters, digits, hyphens, underscores; max 64 chars. The model sees this verbatim and uses it in `tool_use` blocks.

description.description: What the tool does, when to use it. The model reads this to decide whether to call the tool. Be specific about triggers.

type.description: Must be the literal string "object" — the Messages API rejects schemas without an explicit object type.

properties.description: Map of input field name → JSON Schema for that field.

required.description: Array of field names that must be present when the model calls the tool.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema describing the tool's input. MUST have top-level type:object.

cache_control.description: Mark this tool definition as a prompt-cache breakpoint. Limit: 4 cache_control breakpoints per request, total.
